description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes external variable, image, and security templates (variables.yml, final_images.yml, Container-Scanning, Dependency-Scanning, etc.) and defines a long list of stages from test through cleanup. Set global default tags to gitlab-org-docker and define many CI variables such as ARCH_LIST, BUILDKIT_IMAGE, DOCKER_VERSION, and others. Add a report‑stage job named issue-bot that uses the image ${CI_REGISTRY}/${GITLAB_NAMESPACE}/distribution/issue-bot:latest, runs the command /issue-bot, and is triggered only on pipeline failure while being excluded for protected branches and a specific project path. The job also sets the ISSUE_BOT_LABELS_EXTRA variable and does not define caches or artifacts.
